description_long: This is a cylindrical lotion container with a deep green body and a matching green cap. Around the midsection, there is a festive wrap featuring Christmas-themed graphics, including pine branches, gold stars, baubles, and wrapped gifts. The wrap also displays the text 'Merry Christmas and Happy New Year' in white, making it a seasonal or holiday edition product. The surface of the container is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and giving it a sleek appearance. The cap appears to be a simple, solid design, likely a screw-on type, with no visible dispensing mechanism. The overall look is cheerful and decorative, suitable for gifting or display during the holiday season.
description: A glossy green cylindrical lotion container with a festive Christmas-themed wrap and a matching green cap. The packaging features holiday graphics and celebratory text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Merry Christmas and Happy New Year' text, pine branches, and gold stars on the wrap.
description_view_1: Side view with partial text and more baubles, with the festive wrap continuing around the cylinder.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting wrapped gifts with gold bows and additional baubles, less text visible.
description_view_3: Side view showing a mix of pine branches, baubles, and gifts, with the wrap's graphics blending together.
